steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to "specify which countries the Danube River passes through." The notes list two countries: Hungary and Romania. Any correct choice must include both.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'passes through both Hungary and Romania': names both countries directly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'not the longest river in the world': discusses world rank, not countries. ✗
  • Choice C — '2,888 kilometers long': gives length and European rank, not countries. ✗
  • Choice D — 'ranks No. 30': gives world rank, not countries. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
